title: Monitoring Argo CD instances

includes.title: Monitoring Argo CD health using Prometheus metrics

sections.title: Monitoring Argo CD health using Prometheus metrics

prerequisites: You have access to the cluster with `cluster-admin` privileges.
You have access to the {product-title} web console.
You have installed the {gitops-title} Operator in your cluster.
You have installed an Argo CD application in your defined namespace, for example, `openshift-gitops`.
